title: hydrangea hortensia
intro: Hydrangea hortensia, also known as Bigleaf Hydrangea or Hortensia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family and is native to East Asia. The roots and leaves of the plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, providing various health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Hydrangea hortensia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
